creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 246975
0001-net-p2p-prowlarr-Update-to-1.10.5.4116.patch

poudriere ok
runs in production on my setup (14.0 amd64)

Also added the patch by Ralf van der Enden posted on https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=246929&action=edit so prowlarr starts on FreeBSD14 as well without importing openssl111 port/package. Thanks!
